description: Multi-enrollment SMTP relay. Each enrollment connects to a different SMTP server. Customers supply the non-secret pieces (host, port, username) directly as enrollment parameters, and name a single customer secret holding the SMTP password (`password_secret`). This enables multiple relay configurations — e.g., personal Gmail, work SendGrid, transactional SES — under a single account, with only the actual secret material stored in the customer-secrets store.
name: smtp-relay-plus

payout_price.description: No platform commission — customer uses own SMTP
